positive_observations: All 4 Pinia stores are synchronous-only with no I/O operations -- error-free-by-design pattern, consistent with the existing mcp.ts store
All 4 Vue components are purely presentational with no async operations, no fetch calls, no JSON.parse -- no error handling needed
Optional chaining in templates (selectedMemory?.id, todaySummary?.personalNote) is correctly guarded by v-if directives, not hiding errors
Nullish coalescing fallbacks in activity.ts (?? 0, ?? []) provide sensible defaults for when todaySummary is null -- correct pattern for optional summary data
Todo store validates empty input (title.trim() check) before creating items -- defensive without needing try/catch
Memory store correctly nullifies selectedMemory when deleted item was selected -- avoids stale reference bugs
